buildCommand: git clone https://github.com/flutter/flutter.git -b stable --depth 1 _flutter && export PATH="$PWD/_flutter/bin:$PATH" && flutter doctor && flutter pub get && flutter build web --release --dart-define=APP_FLAVOR=$APP_FLAVOR --dart-define=APP_NAME="$APP_NAME" --dart-define=SUPABASE_URL=$SUPABASE_URL --dart-define=SUPABASE_ANON_KEY=$SUPABASE_ANON_KEY --dart-define=APP_DEBUG_LOG=$APP_DEBUG_LOG
